title: houstonia calycosa
intro: Houstonia calycosa, also known as the pinkHoustonia, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Houstonia calycosa include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it a valuable natural remedy. The plant can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal medicine to promote healing and prevent infection.
